## Testing

Manual testing details:

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing style and structure.
- [ ] I have not introduced new dependencies without justification.
- [ ] I have removed any personal credentials, session tokens, or third-party media from my changes.
- [ ] My changes do not enable bulk-scraping or bypassing platform access controls.
- [ ] If I added/modified `tweet.json` fields, I updated the schema and validation accordingly.
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation if needed.
